title: Single Malt Speyside Scotch Whisky - The Glenlivet UK

Submit Select your country and region Canada - English Canada - Français Deutschland International Polska South Africa 台灣地區 United Kingdom United States Việt Nam SUBSCRIBE AND JOIN US THE GLENLIVET ETERNAL COLLECTION EXPLORE NOW elevate your whisky game explore more INTRODUCING THE GLENLIVET 56 YEAR OLD Over five decades of maturation have shaped this extraordinary single malt into a whisky of profound depth and refinement. Each drop reflects The Glenlivet’s unwavering pursuit of perfection, finished in bespoke Sherry casks to reveal layers of richness and complexity. With only 60 bottles available globally, it stands among the rarest expressions ever released. Delicious pours. This Lunar New Year, gather around the table with The Glenlivet. 655 11 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18099689020905635 The Glenlivet 20 Year Old Orchard Fruitiness. ​ A harmonious blend of first fill American oak, second fill ex-Scotch, and second fill American oak hogsheads. ​ Luscious orchard fruits and warming spices create notes of spiced apple slices, caramelised figs, and toffee sauce followed by warming cinnamon. ​ Fruity. Syrupy. Exceptional. 861 6 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18075801869624374 The Glenlivet 19 Year Old Indulgent Chocolate. ​ A rich tapestry of first fill American oak, first fill Sherry, and second fill ex-Scotch barrels. ​ This expression showcases the remarkable diversity of combining different casks. Dark fruits and spices with a rich, spicy yet sweet finish. Indulgent by name, extraordinary by nature. 1054 10 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18121799536566296 The Glenlivet 17 Year Old Wildflower Honey.​ Exclusively matured in first fill American oak. Bright apple and citrus notes develop into sweet, floral complexity. ​ This expression delivers baked Granny Smith apples, honeydew melon, lemon drizzle cake, orange marmalade, toasted almonds and ginger spice with a sweet, floral and complex finish. 738 7 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 17945511384102007 Introducing the return of The Small Batch Collection with three new aged expressions. A testament to authentic whisky craftsmanship, the new collection invites whisky enthusiasts and collectors to delve deeper into the nuanced art of flavour, showcasing the remarkable diversity achieved when combining different casks. Under the guardianship of The Glenlivet Cask Master, Kevin Balmforth, and his team, these meticulously crafted single malt whiskies dial up specific flavours and express them at cask strength and without chill filtration to preserve their purity and intensify the flavour profile. An adventure for the palate, not to be missed. The new Small Batch Collection is available to purchase globally at specialist retailers and The Glenlivet Brand Home. 814 14 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 17988016277765702 The Glenlivet 18 Year Old knows how to make an entrance into the new year. 223 1 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18076995731256995 Treat your guest with a delicious winter cocktail. The Glenlivet Spiced Spey Coffee is our velvety, effortlessly smooth upgrade of a traditional whisky coffee. 303 1 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18308074279266205 Your festive table just found its centrepiece. Sweet fig, blood orange, charred pineapple, toasted oak. Let The Glenlivet 25 Year Old speak for themselves. 511 4 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 17972891753966685 Festive traditions, but with a modern twist. #TheGlenlivet wishes you a happy holiday season. 269 1 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18546479959056211 The true festive gift is a moment well savoured with The Glenlivet 12 Year Old. 355 4 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 17987282600868377 The best gifts aren`t wrapped in paper; they`re wrapped in eighteen years of craft. 410 6 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18377561593146413 When your decorations need as much craft as what you`re pouring. #TheGlenlivet 541 19 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18086836498829550 Some days call for a little extra warmth. And when it comes to comforting pours, you can’t go wrong with The Glenlivet Hot Toddy. 331 4 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18048651107409595 Following on from the one-off creation, we are proud to unveil The Glenlivet Eternal Collection, Second Edition, 56 Year Old in collaboration with Fredrikson Stallard @fredriksonstallard. Over five decades of maturation have shaped this extraordinary single malt into a whisky of profound depth and refinement. Each drop reflects The Glenlivet’s unwavering pursuit of perfection, finished in bespoke Sherry casks to reveal layers of richness and complexity. Limited to only 60 bottles worldwide, it stands as the pinnacle of rarity and refinement. 513 7 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18020333276609455 The Glenlivet Eternal Collection, Second Edition, 56 Year Old, 1 of 1, was sold for a final price of £75,000 (US$98,146)* on November 20th at the @sothebyswine Sotheby’s Finest & Rarest Whisky Auction. This magnificent bottle and sculpture underscores The Glenlivet’s continuous pursuit of excellence in the world of prestige single malt Scotch whisky. All proceeds will benefit the @nationaltrustforscotland National Trust for Scotland, dedicated to conserving Scotland’s natural and cultural heritage. *Final price including VAT & buyer`s premium. 538 10 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 17980530773775519 Introducing The Glenlivet Eternal Collection, Second Edition, 56 Year Old, 1 of 1, a rare and remarkable creation that reveals layers of depth and indulgence shaped over decades of patient maturation. This second release in our landmark partnership with @sothebyswine represents the pinnacle of more than five decades of craftsmanship, innovation, and maturation expertise. The elegant art sculpture was designed and crafted by Fredrikson Stallard @fredriksonstallard , a British-Swedish art and design practice based in London. Their sculptural display serves as a modern ode to both nature and legacy. The sculpture depicts the scorched, raw heather branches before their abundant regeneration; they rise from an ancient rock drawn from the Speyside land itself to symbolise strength, perseverance and authenticity. This rare whisky is now on display at the Sotheby’s London Gallery, with bidding available solely through Sotheby’s Finest & Rarest Whisky auction until 20 November 2025. All proceeds from the auction will support @nationaltrustforscotland ’s excavation work within the Cairngorms. #TheGlenlivet56YearOld #TheGlenlivetEternalCollection 1229 21 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18138487252409991 Smooth, rich, and distinctive. From notes of baked apple and citrus zest to creamy toffee and blackcurrant, The Glenlivet Cask Master’s Collection nods to our mastery of makers and signature copper stills, highlighting our definitive Speyside style. Which one do you want to discover first? Available exclusively at Duty Free Boutiques worldwide. 383 4 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18065949758524277 Two centuries of mastery, three remarkable expressions. Our Cask Master, Kevin Balmforth, has meticulously selected the finest casks to create a trio of beautifully rounded, well-balanced whiskies with an abundance of fruity notes that capture the very essence of Speyside, the heart of Single Malt Scotch whisky. Available exclusively at Duty Free Boutiques worldwide. 507 7 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18044934611451602 Introducing The Glenlivet Cask Master’s Collection, a new aged range of 14, 16, and 19 Year Old expressions. Each expression celebrates the mastery and vision of our Cask Master, Kevin Balmforth, showcasing The Glenlivet’s iconic smooth style. Mastery is a journey. Available exclusively at Duty Free Boutiques worldwide. 321 2 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 17967431534986236 Adventure awaits Beyond Speyside, with The Glenlivet Jamaica Edition. Join @thomasadoherty and @miquealsymone as they explore the cultural vibrancy of Jamaica, taking an unexpected path to something truly original. See the full film at the link on our bio. US Exclusive Edition 158 4 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18061954457629000 The Glenlivet SPIRA 60 Year Old 1965 has been auctioned for a final price of £650,000 / $871,358 *, setting a new auction record for a bottle of The Glenlivet after a ten-minute bidding battle at the @distillers_one_of_one auction in partnership with @sothebyswine All proceeds will benefit the Youth Action Fund, supporting young people in Scotland, particularly those from disadvantaged backgrounds, to reach their potential and make a positive impact in their communities. We are humbled by this achievement and deeply grateful to all the artisans and partners who brought this extraordinary creation to life. The Glenlivet SPIRA 60 Year Old is a true masterpiece, featuring the oldest expression ever released by the brand, presented in a 1.5-litre spiral-inspired decanter, hand-blown and shaped by Brodie Nairn at Glasstorm. It stands as a testament to our ongoing pursuit of excellence and our commitment to redefining the traditional codes as the definitive Speyside single malt. *Final price includes VAT and buyer’s premium. 324 7 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18056821448231235 The @distillers_one_of_one charity auction will be held today, 2pm BST at Hopetoun House. The Glenlivet SPIRA 60 Year Old represents the unwavering pursuit of liquid perfection that defines The Glenlivet. Watch this space. #TheGlenlivet60YearOld 490 3 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18087936415716023 With notes of sweet juicy plums, drizzled with dark chocolate, The Glenlivet 18 Year Old is an indulgent treat made for special occasions. 390 4 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18058725641544029 Friday is for a smooth take-off and perfect landing. The Glenlivet Paper Plane mixes our single malt with herbal and Italian liqueurs, and a squeeze of lemon for a bittersweet sip you`re sure to visit again. 330 4 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 17937716322065707 One sip is all it takes. #TheGlenlivet 410 4 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 17863638249472220 Come join us for a dram – it`s the smoothest one you`ll find. #TheGlenlivet 153 2 Open post by theglenlivet with ID 18398338630184366 STAY CONNECTED Join our community Subscribe Terms & Conditions Your information may be used by Chivas Brothers International Limited and made available through us to any other entities of the Pernod Ricard Group.
